intended_use.summary: Evaluate the frozen Milli 0843 CS Sentinel, BAER, MTBS, and RAVG sources for selection into a separate future controlled-intake contract without requesting source-asset bytes.

sources.name: Milli Sentinel-2 L2A route through CDSE

evidence.note: Historical 2026-07-15 metadata found zero single Sentinel items covering every Milli boundary vertex; no current STAC or OData roster was queried.

criteria.note: No exact current scene, tile, orbit, baseline, UUID, size, checksum, or online identity is selected.

evidence.note: Current CDSE and Sentinel notice semantics were readable, but the page reader exposed no evidence-grade request timestamp, redirects, bounds, bytes, or hash.

criteria.note: Historical authority is established, but U03 lacks a current evidence-grade authority observation for this component.
The exact current STAC, OData, and future product routes were not exercised.

evidence.note: Sentinel-data use is supportable in principle with source identification, but U03 did not bind a current evidence-grade notice to an exact scene roster.

criteria.note: No exact future Sentinel product set is authorized by U03.
Current acquisition, tile, processing, publication, and provider product lineage is absent.

evidence.note: A future route must bind exact STAC and OData identities, provider MD5 and BLAKE3, local SHA-256, safe archive structure, and no-overwrite custody before use.

criteria.note: A deterministic integrity plan exists; no scene or byte is currently accepted.

evidence.note: Historical metadata found zero single-item full-boundary candidates; no current stable multi-tile union, seam, grid, cloud, snow, local-pixel, or registration proof ran.

criteria.note: Optical fitness remains unproved.

evidence.note: Authentication, product download, signed routes, credentials, account state, and custody mutation were forbidden.

criteria.note: No credential, private route, account datum, or product byte was touched.

sources.name: Milli BAER map 10004702 through the Burn Severity Portal

evidence.note: Verified prior scout binds catalog 2033, map 10004702, 24,216 acres, and nonstandard false; U03 did not refresh it.

criteria.note: Current exact BAER catalog and delivery identity is unresolved.
No evidence-grade current BAER authority page or catalog observation was completed.
No current catalog record, queue route, delivery identity, or product route was exercised.

evidence.note: Prior exact deliveries show that some preliminary thresholded BAER products restrict further distribution; a future Milli notice cannot be inherited.

criteria.note: Local retention, processing, derived publication, and raw redistribution rights for an exact Milli BAER delivery are unknown.
Exact delivery members, notices, contributors, dates, processing, model, and transformations are unopened.

evidence.note: A future delivery must use a separately authorized no-overwrite request, hash every delivered byte/member, inspect notices first, and reject unsafe archive structure.

criteria.note: A deterministic future integrity plan exists; no delivery is accepted.
Exact product family, grid, dates, thresholds, quality, boundary relation, and permissible evidence role are unknown.

evidence.note: Portal queue submission, private delivery links, recipient data, email state, provider bytes, and custody mutation were forbidden.

criteria.note: No private delivery or provider content was touched.

sources.name: Milli MTBS map 10008215 through MTBS and the Burn Severity Portal

evidence.note: Verified prior scout binds event OR4425712174320170811, catalog 11202, map 10008215, 24,065 acres, and nonstandard false; U03 did not refresh the event or map.

criteria.note: Current exact event, boundary, map, and Portal delivery identity is unresolved.

evidence.note: Current official USDA Forest Service MTBS boundary metadata returned 23,634 bytes with exact SHA-256 e56b96c0366a4da515f18664c1fcfad838616f5ba67c68c92f7a492d3ac412c1.
Current official USDA Forest Service MTBS occurrence metadata returned 21,884 bytes with exact SHA-256 807638cf7b91d9847e0a87d178d7c77a4e59b35808c9930df4d683eff14e8b88.

criteria.note: The current collection metadata establishes USDA Forest Service and joint MTBS authority; it does not establish exact Milli identity or fitness.
No current event query, boundary query, Portal record, queue, delivery, or asset route was exercised.

evidence.note: Current collection metadata states no use restriction except reasonable and proper acknowledgement, but the request transport trace is incomplete and no exact future Milli delivery notice was inspected.

criteria.note: Exact delivery retention, processing, derived-publication, and raw-redistribution rights remain unresolved.
Current boundary, assessment, pre/post image, threshold, release, delivery-member, and notice lineage was not reconciled.

evidence.note: A future exact request must bind event/map identity, preserve delivered bytes no-overwrite, hash and inspect every member/notice, and stop on any mismatch.

criteria.note: A deterministic future integrity plan exists; no event record or delivery is accepted.

evidence.note: Current MTBS documentation preserves analyst, threshold, field-data, 30 m, revision, timing, and boundary-versus-perimeter limitations; no exact Milli pixels or geometry were inspected.

criteria.note: MTBS remains revisable analyst-interpreted reference evidence, never automatic truth.

evidence.note: Only public metadata was in scope; queue submission, private delivery, provider bytes, and custody mutation were forbidden.

criteria.note: No private delivery or provider content was touched.

evidence.note: A future delivery must use a separately authorized no-overwrite request, hash every delivered byte/member, inspect notices first, and reject unsafe archive structure.

criteria.note: A deterministic future integrity plan exists; no delivery is accepted.
Exact grid, image dates, model, sparse/non-tree behavior, forest applicability, boundary relation, and permissible evidence role are unknown.

blocking_reasons: The exact future Milli BAER, MTBS, and RAVG archive retention, processing, and derived-publication rights remain unknown.
The current terms attempts lack complete no-redirect, bounded-request, timestamp, and response-identity trace for every observation.
Current event, boundary, Portal, STAC, OData, provenance, acquisition cost, and integrity identities were not refreshed after the stop.
Complete-boundary multi-tile support, seam/grid behavior, local quality, registration, and both-class evidence remain unproved.
